name: Mike,s Three Meat Texas Red Chili - Southern
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in batches, starting with pork and then beef and veal. Remove from the pan and drain excess oil.
2. Add onions and green peppers to the pot and sauté until softened.
3. Return the meat to the pot.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except corn meal and water.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer and cook for 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Mix corn meal with enough water to form a slurry, then stir into the chili.
7. Cook until the desired consistency is reached.
8. Serve hot with grated cheddar cheese and chopped raw onions on top, or sour cream.
NOTE: This chili can also be cooked in a crockpot on low for 8 to 10 hours, or in a pressure cooker at 15 pounds pressure for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
